raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu wiꞥſsch Kungs
Rihta zehlahs/ un tahs Namma
Durwis atdarrija/ un iſgahje fa-
wu Zeltu ſtaigahrt/ reds/ tad gul-
leja ta Seerwa/ wiꞥſsch leeka See-
wa preeſſch tahm Naimina Dur-
win/ un wiꞥſsch Kohlas us to
Sleekſni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſsch fazzija us to:
Zellees / eima prohjam / bet ue
weens athbildeja/tad nehme wiꞥſsch
to us ſawu Ehseli/ un tas Wihrs
zehlahs / un gahje us ſawu
Weetu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu wiꞥſsch us ſawu
Nammu nahze / tad nehme
wiꞥſsch weenu Nasi/ un fagrahbe
tawu leeku Seetwu / un ſakap-
paja to ar wiꞥſsch Kauleem diwi-
padeſſintis Daltâs/ un fuhttija
to us wiſſahm Israëta Rohbe-
schahin.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſ / tas to redſeja /
tas fazzija: Tahda Leeta/ kaſchi/
ne irr notikkufi/ ne irr redſeta tap-
pufi/ kamehr Israëta Behrni no
Egiptes- Semmes iſgahjuſchi/
lihdsſchat paſchai Deenat. Tad
nu juhs xemineet to paſchu weh-
râ/ dohdeet Padohmu un ruñajt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ad iſgahje wiſſi Israë-
Behrni/ un ta Draud-
tapulzejahs/ ka ween
weenigs Wihrs/ no Danna lihe
Bersabai / ir Gileadas Semm
pee ta KUNGA eekſch Mizpas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſſu Lauschu Wirſnee-
ti wiſſas Israëta Zilts/ rahdijah-
eekſch tahs Draudses to Deewa
Lanschu/ tschetrfints Rahjineeſti,
kas to Sohbinu iſwilke.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad dſirdeja Benjaminis
Behrni / ka Israëta Behrni btja
us Mizpu gabijſcht / un Israë-
Behrni fazzija: Sakkajt / ka tru-
schi ſaunu Leeta notikkufi?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad athbildeja tas Wihrs/
tas Lewits / tahs nokautas See-
was Wihrs/ un fazzija : Es nah-
fu ar ſawu Seewu us Gibbeju/
kas Benjaminam peederr pahr
Nafti tur palikt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zehlahs prett mann tee
Namneekt no Gibbejas/un apstah-
je mann eekſch ta Namma Nak-
ti/ manni dohmaja tee nokaut/un
mannu leeku Seetwu irr tee ap-
finchjuſchi/ ka ta irr nomirruſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nehmu es mannu leeku
Seewu/ un dalliju to/ un fuhttiju
to wiſſas Teefas ta Israëta Jh-
pachuma / jo tee irr Negantibu
un trakku Leetu darrijschi eekſch
Israëta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Raugi/ juhs wiſſi effat Jh-
fraëta Behrni/farunnajeetees/ un
dohdeet Padohmu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zehlahs wiſſi Laudis/ ka
weens weentgs Wihrs/un fazzija:
Mehs ne ecſim ne weens us muh-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
